jd.title: Python Developer (Python 3.0 or above, Django, Flask, Angular/React/Vue/JavaScript, Python Libraries (Panda/NumPy/Sci-kit), SQL and PL/SQL)
responsibilities: Good communication, analytical and problem-solving skills
jd.full_description:
Immediate need for a talented Python Developer (Python 3.0 or above, Django, Flask, Angular/React/Vue/JavaScript, Python Libraries (Panda/NumPy/Sci-kit), SQL and PL/SQL). This is a Fulltime opportunity with long-term potential and is located in Charlotte, NC(Hybrid). Please review the job description below and contact me ASAP if you are interested.  No of Positions: 20 Job Title/Role: Python Developer (Python 3.0 or above, Django, Flask, Angular/React/Vue/JavaScript, Python Libraries (Panda/NumPy/Sci-kit), SQL and PL/SQL) Work Location: Hybrid Work (3 days from office and 2 days from home)Charlotte, NCJersey City, NJNew York, NY Open to Relocate candidates can also apply. Required Skills:Python 3.0 or above, Django, Flask, Angular/React/Vue/JavaScript, Python Libraries (Panda/NumPy/Sci-kit), SQL and PL/SQL Key Requirements and Technology Experience: 
Must have Overall 7+ years of IT industry experience.Must have minimum 5+ years of development experience in Python Programming.Must have good Python/OOPs programming skills (Python 3.0 or above).Must have experience with Django, Flask.Must have experience with web application development (Angular/React/Vue/JavaScript).Must have experience with Python Libraries (For eg; NumPy/Panda/Sci-kit).Must have strong experience with SQL and PL/SQL.Must have strong development and programming skills.Must have good communication, analytical and problem-solving skills. Preferred:Banking/Financial ExperienceTrading/Marketing Experience COMPENSATION: The base pay for this position ranges from $90,000 to $130,000. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Dependent on the position offered, commission, bonus, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package.
Employee benefits include, but are not limited to, health insurance (medical, dental, vision), unlimited vacation and 401(k) plan.
ABOUT PYRAMID CONSULTING, Inc. – as one of the largest minorities and privately owned staffing firms in the U.S., Pyramid Consulting focuses on providing our clients with high-quality technical professionals and services to support their business and IT initiatives. The success of our clients is facilitated through our ability to provide full-spectrum support via our development centers – from a single consultant under their management, at their site, to full turnkey solutions onsite and offshore.
Pyramid Consulting, Inc. is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All applicants hired will be subject to a background check and drug screening.

expected_output.summary: An accomplished Chemical Engineer and IT Professional, with 10+ years of International work experience in Chemical Engineer Development. Skilled in research and data analysis and experienced in solving complex problems. Seeking to attain a position where I can use my experience in Chemical Engineering and educational background in IT.

experience.title: Information Technology Specialist
bullets: Build, implement or support electronic health records and other systems that store patient's data
Assisted in network management and software development
Took periodic review of set standards and database

experience.company: National Board for Technology Incubation, Abuja Nigeria (Federal Ministry of Science and Technology)
experience.title: Principal Chemical Engineer / Information Technology Specialist
bullets: Monitored, implemented, and maintained IT systems
Produced technical reports, analyzed data, and built databases
Facilitated discussions to resolve a safety concern with a key process monitoring instrument
Planned and designed technology related activities aimed at nurturing the growth of innovative businesses
Provided technical support and capacity building in science and technology
Collaborated with market development on new IT technologies for industrial and consumer groups

experience.title: Facility Engineer Intern
bullets: Analyzed process data from newly revamped furnace to improve efficiency of long-term performance monitoring plan by over 50%
Developed and maintained of engineering/operating standards through periodic review
Improved 40% Reliability/uptime performance and cost reduction efforts for the production units
Managed materials through preventive/corrective maintenance of products

experience.title: Engineer Intern
bullets: Produce a piping and instrumentation diagram of the pumphouse, cooling tower and condensate lines
Led weekly group meetings with interns and management for future improvements
Monitored, troubleshoot, and observed operations and processes for quality, damages and /or defects

certifications: Licensed Registered Engineer Council for regulation of Engineering in Nigeria (COREN)
education: Master of Science : Chemical Engineering, University of Lagos, 11/2005
Master of Science Degree : Computer Science and Information Technology, University of the District of Columbia
Bachelor of Engineering : Chemical Engineering, Federal University of Technology, 09/2001

provenance.circularity_notes: Real CV text + real JD text. Expected output is LLM-parsed extraction from real text (not invention). 4/8 scorecard checks structurally sound regardless.
